protocol.type: runner-registered pure probe; sequential oracle-to-proxy map; no training
protocol.critical_fix: force data_split_seed=seed and run seeds sequentially to avoid global random.shuffle cross-thread drift
protocol.label_boundary: labels diagnostic-only for AUC/AP and oracle top-K boundary categories
protocol.formula_boundary: mat_mean = response_matrix.mean(axis=(1,2)); direct equality check saved

variant_summaries.definition: Legacy GT-3 reproduction: hop_attr descriptor, PCA-residual normal model, labeled-normal normal references, normal_soft_or anomaly scoring, descriptor-similarity anomaly references, GT_num_layers=3, full anomaly candidate pool.
